name: upgrade_project
short_description: Upgrade a project from a previous release to use the latest Vivado features.
full_help:
upgrade_project

Description: 
Upgrade a project from a previous release to use the latest Vivado features.

Syntax: 
upgrade_project  [-migrate_output_products] [-log <arg>]
                 [-migrate_to_inline_hdl] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                        Description
  ---------------------------------------
  [-migrate_output_products]  Migrate the output products directory structure
                              to the latest Vivado structure.
  [-log]                      (Optional) Identifies the log file to which the
                              project upgrade report will be concatenated. 
                              Default: An empty string, indicating that no 
                              log will be written
                              Values: A file path to an existing writable 
                              file, or a non-existent file location in a 
                              writable directory
  [-migrate_to_inline_hdl]    Migrate the utility IP (xl*/util_*) in all user
                              BDs to inline hdl .
  [-quiet]                    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project
